Do not add 'use client' to every component; this negates the benefits of Server Components
Do not use useEffect for initial data fetching in components that could be Server Components
Do not create API route handlers solely to fetch data for your own Server Components; fetch directly
Do not perform heavy computation or data transformation in Client Components when it can be done server-side
Do not use next/router from 'next/router' in the App Router; use next/navigation instead
Do not nest layouts unnecessarily; each layout persists state across navigations of its child segments
Do not call Server Actions from third-party scripts or outside React's component tree without proper CSRF handling
Do not return large payloads from Server Actions; return only the data the client needs
Do not use default exports for utility functions; reserve default exports for page, layout, and route files
Do not block rendering with sequential awaits when requests are independent; parallelize them
